name: Devil's Steak
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons Cooking Oil Or As Needed
10 ounces (1 cup) Mushroom Stems and Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into small pieces.
2. Trim all fat and membranes from the pieces.
3. Pound each piece until 1/4-inch or less.
4. Mix mustard and spices in a bowl.
5. Dredge the meat on both sides in the mixture.
6. Heat a large frying pan over medium heat with oil.
7. Fry a few pieces at a time, about 1 to 1-1/2 minutes on each side, until golden brown. Keep warm.
8. Drain mushrooms and reserve the liquid.
9. Add the mushroom liquid and Worcestershire sauce to the pan.
10. Simmer and scrape off any pan drippings.
11. Add mushrooms and wine to the liquid. If desired, thicken with flour or cornstarch.
12. Serve over meat.
NOTE:
Meat may be pounded ahead of time if desired. Refrigerate in single layers or dry slightly before dredging as this will make it brown more quickly.
